allies.rationale_text: Abstraction helps narratives compress complex facts into a clear causal line without making the audience hold every detail at once.
allies.source_quote: turn scattered evidence into one clear line of meaning

allies.rationale_text: Simplification helps narratives keep the core message concrete and memorable enough that people can act on it.
allies.source_quote: Focus on the Core and Concrete: identify the core message and eliminate any detail that does not serve the central purpose.

allies.rationale_text: Signaling helps narratives communicate belief-shifting meaning in a legible form when adoption depends on identity or causal coherence.
allies.source_quote: Works best when adoption depends on belief shift, identity shift, or coherent sequencing rather than on dumping more disconnected facts at the audience.

antagonists.rationale_text: Formal-reasoning conflicts with narratives when story quality outruns explicit logic and proof structure.
antagonists.source_quote: The structured rigor of methodologies like the McKinsey-pioneered MECE principle contrasts with the sequential, character-driven nature of narratives.

antagonists.rationale_text: Critical-thinking resists narratives when a compelling arc starts erasing uncertainty, trade-offs, or missing evidence.
Confirmation-bias intensifies narratives when rhetorical skill is used to defend a desired conclusion rather than test it.
antagonists.source_quote: Smart individuals can use their rhetorical skills to spin compelling narratives to persuade themselves toward a desired conclusion, rather than seeking objective truth.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Narratives conflicts with base-rates when a compelling story overrides statistical frequency data that should anchor the estimate.
structured_tensions.source_quote: narratives conflicts with base-rates (base rates) when a compelling story overrides statistical frequency data that should anchor the estimate.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Narratives conflicts with confirmation-bias when narrative coherence is constructed by selectively including supporting evidence and omitting disconfirming data.
structured_tensions.source_quote: narratives conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when narrative coherence is constructed by selectively including supporting evidence and omitting disconfirming data.

curation_notes.summary: The retained relation surface stays conservative around meaning compression, legibility, and the risk that story quality outruns logic or proof.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader System 1 or backstory expansion because the current vocabulary already supports a tighter evidence-versus-arc surface.
open_questions: The source is clearer on ally and antagonist pressure than on explicit current-vocabulary tension phrasing, so structured tensions stay omitted.
